name: WaveNet Dilated Causal Convolution Stack

task.description: Create a single 1920x1080 self-contained HTML file using ONLY inline CSS and inline SVG that reproduces the WaveNet dilated causal convolution figure. Title 'WaveNet: Dilated Causal Convolutions' at top in 32px bold. Draw FOUR stacked horizontal layers of nodes, bottom to top: 'Input' (dilation 1), 'Hidden Layer (dilation 2)', 'Hidden Layer (dilation 4)', 'Output (dilation 8)'. Each layer is a horizontal row of EXACTLY SIXTEEN small circular nodes evenly spaced and vertically aligned in columns across the four rows. Draw the dilated-causal connection edges: each node connects upward to nodes spaced by the layer's dilation factor (1, 2, 4, 8), only to PAST timesteps (causal: edges go up-and-to-the-right or straight up, never to a future/right-of-target input). The growing receptive field should be visible as the fan-out widening with depth. Label the dilation factor (1, 2, 4, 8) at the left of each layer. Sixteen nodes per row, four rows, dilations doubling. HARDEN (density + alignment): ALSO include (a) a LEGEND box that maps every distinct block color and every arrow/line style used in the figure, and (b) a small tensor-shape annotation on each major block (e.g. 'BxNxd'). Pack the figure densely with at least 14 labeled elements; every group of sibling blocks must be equal-size and share edges, with uniform gutters, and nothing may overlap or clip.
requirements: All FOUR node rows (Input, three above) are fully visible with no clipping at any edge
Each row contains EXACTLY sixteen nodes, evenly spaced and column-aligned across rows
No two nodes overlap each other
Each layer's dilation factor (1, 2, 4, 8) is labelled at the left and legible without overlapping nodes
Connection edges respect causality: no edge connects a node to an input that is to its RIGHT (future timestep)
Edge spacing per layer reflects the doubling dilation (1, 2, 4, 8) so higher layers skip more nodes
The receptive field visibly widens (more fan-out) from the input layer to the output layer
Edges do not pass through unrelated nodes in a way that makes connectivity ambiguous (edges are distinguishable)
Row labels and dilation annotations do not overlap the node grid
No element is within 10px of any viewport edge
No horizontal or vertical scrollbar appears; all content fits inside 1920x1080

A legend box maps every block color and arrow/line style used; each major block carries a tensor-shape annotation; sibling blocks are equal-size and edge-aligned with uniform gutters; no element overlaps or is clipped

rv_html:
WaveNet: Dilated Causal Convolutions
Legend
Input Nodes (Dilation 1)
Hidden Layer 1 (Dilation 2)
Hidden Layer 2 (Dilation 4)
Output Nodes (Dilation 8)
Causal Connections
Key Properties:
• Causal: Only past timesteps
• Dilated: Skip connections
• Exponential receptive field
• Parallel computation
• Efficient training
Tensor Shapes:
B = Batch size
16 = Sequence length
d₀,d₁,d₂,d₃ = Feature dimensions
